name: Hatch (Modern Python Project Manager)

auth.notes: Local tool; PyPI upload uses token

performance.notes: Environment management; build times in seconds

agent_readiness.notes: Official PyPA Python project manager. PEP 517/518 compliant builds. Environment management. Multiple environments (test, docs, etc.) in pyproject.toml. Built-in test runner. Version management (semver). Publish to PyPI. Plugin system. Compatible with hatchling build backend. Alternative to Poetry (not PEP standard) and setuptools (verbose). Increasingly adopted by PyPA-adjacent projects.

gotchas: Newer ecosystem — fewer plugins than Poetry
Env management different from Poetry's virtual env approach
Learning curve for users accustomed to Poetry/pip
uv doesn't fully replace hatch's env management yet
best_when: Python library development following PyPA standards
Multi-environment project management (test, docs, lint envs)
PEP-compliant packaging without Poetry's non-standard lock format
avoid_when: Application development (Poetry or uv more common)
When uv's faster resolution already covers the need
summary: Hatch is the official PyPA Python project manager. PEP 517/518 compliant builds via hatchling. Multi-environment management in pyproject.toml. Version management, testing, publishing. Plugin system. The PyPA-endorsed alternative to Poetry. Best for library development following Python standards. uv is faster for dependency resolution; hatch excels at environment and lifecycle management.
